steps.title: Identify the linear model parameters
steps.content:
The whale's weight follows a linear model with:
  • Initial weight: 5,820 pounds (at birth, when time = 0)
  • Rate of gain: 10.0 pounds per hour
  • Time of interest: 8 hours after birth
The formula for a linear model is: $$\text{Weight} = \text{Initial weight} + \text{(rate)} \times \text{(time)}$$

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content: Plug in the values: $$\text{Weight} = 5820 + 10.0 \times 8$$ $$\text{Weight} = 5820 + 80$$ $$\text{Weight} = 5900 \text{ pounds}$$ The estimated weight 8 hours after birth is 5,900 pounds.
